name: Liu Fei (刘肥)
title: King Dao of Qi (齐悼惠王)
status: Eldest son, by a different mother

name: Liu Heng (刘恒)
title: Emperor Wen (孝文帝)
status: Originally King of Dai, became emperor

name: Liu Hui (刘恢)
title: King Gong of Zhao (赵共王)
status: Moved from King of Liang, committed suicide

name: Liu You (刘友)
title: King You of Zhao (赵幽王)
status: Starved to death under Empress Lü

name: Liu Chang (刘长)
title: King Li of Huainan (淮南厉王)
